para_trans: GOVERNMENT ORDER NO. HD- 10010/5/2026 E-1573409 / POL-1
Second Floor, Mantralaya, Madam Cama Marg, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk,
According to the provisions of Section 22N of the Maharashtra Police Act (22 of 1951),
The rank of the IPS / IPS officer mentioned in column (2) of the table is from the rank mentioned in column (3).
The position referred to in column (4) is being replaced by, -
2. This Government Order, Board of Establishments No. With due regard to the recommendations of 1 and Maharashtra
With the approval of the competent authority mentioned in Section 22N of the Police Act (22 of 1951)
This Government Order is available on the website of the Government of Maharashtra www.maharashtra.gov.in.
